specific_question: What percentage of MediConn's IT budget in 2025 was allocated to desktop hardware upgrades?
answer: 18% of the IT budget went to desktop hardware upgrades.
justification: Desktop hardware upgrades do not directly influence virtual care system standards or interoperability.
dr_question: Which IT modernization efforts should MediConn emphasize to stay aligned with national virtual care standards and shared digital health infrastructure by 2026?
